tools.description: Switch pane to specified volume by name
tools.name: select_volume

tools.description: Navigate pane to specified path

path.description: Path to navigate to: absolute, ~-relative, or virtual (mtp://, smb://)

tools.name: nav_to_path

tools.description: Navigate to parent folder
tools.name: nav_to_parent

tools.description: Navigate back in history
tools.name: nav_back

tools.description: Navigate forward in history
tools.name: nav_forward

tools.description: Load region around specified index for large directories
tools.name: scroll_to

tools.description: Focuses pane and moves cursor to index or filename. Provide either index or filename

index.description: Zero-based index to move cursor to

pane.description: Which pane to move cursor in

tools.name: move_cursor

tools.description: Open/enter the item (directory, file, network host, share) under the cursor
tools.name: open_under_cursor

tools.description: Select files in pane. Use names for specific files, count for ranges, all for everything, count=0 to clear

count.description: Number of items from start. 0 clears selection

names.description: Filenames to select. Errors if any name isn't in the listing.

tools.name: select

tools.description: Copy selected files to other pane (opens confirmation dialog)

autoConfirm.description: When true, dialog opens and immediately confirms without waiting for user interaction. Returns once the operation starts.

onConflict.description: Conflict resolution policy for clashing FILES (only when autoConfirm is true). Folders always merge: a source folder landing on a same-named dest folder merges into it, and this policy governs the files inside. Default: skip_all

tools.name: copy

tools.description: Move selected files to other pane (opens confirmation dialog)

autoConfirm.description: When true, dialog opens and immediately confirms without waiting for user interaction. Returns once the operation starts.

onConflict.description: Conflict resolution policy for clashing FILES (only when autoConfirm is true). Folders always merge: a source folder landing on a same-named dest folder merges into it, and this policy governs the files inside. Default: skip_all

tools.name: move

tools.description: Compress selected files into a new zip in the other pane (opens confirmation dialog)

autoConfirm.description: When true, the dialog opens and immediately confirms without waiting for user interaction, returning once the compress starts. Exception: if the target archive already exists, the dialog stays open for the user to confirm the overwrite rather than replacing it silently.

onConflict.description: Carried for shape-uniformity with copy/move. Compress creates ONE new archive, so there are no inner-file conflicts to resolve; an existing target archive is surfaced by the dialog's overwrite affordance instead. Default: skip_all

tools.name: compress

tools.description: Delete selected files (opens confirmation dialog)

autoConfirm.description: When true, dialog opens and immediately confirms without waiting for user interaction. Returns once the operation starts.

tools.name: delete

tools.description: Create folder in focused pane (triggers naming dialog)
tools.name: mkdir

tools.description: Create file in focused pane (triggers naming dialog)
tools.name: mkfile

tools.description: Refresh focused pane
tools.name: refresh

tools.description: Toggle hidden files visibility
tools.name: toggle_hidden

tools.description: Set view mode for pane

pane.description: Which pane to set view mode for

tools.name: set_view_mode

tools.description: Sort files in pane by field and order
tools.name: sort

tools.description: Create, close, activate, pin, or reopen tabs

action.description: Action to perform on the tab

tabId.description: Tab ID. Defaults to active tab for close, close_others, set_pinned. Required for activate. Not used for new or reopen.

tools.name: tab

tools.description: Open, focus, close, or confirm dialogs

action.description: Action to perform. 'confirm' triggers the confirm button on an already-open dialog.

onConflict.description: For confirm action on transfer-confirmation: conflict resolution policy for clashing FILES. Folders always merge (a source folder landing on a same-named dest folder merges into it), and this policy governs the files inside. Default: skip_all

path.description: For file-viewer: file path. On open without path, uses cursor file. On close without path, closes all.

section.description: For settings: which section to open (e.g., 'shortcuts')

type.description: Dialog type. 'transfer-confirmation' covers both copy and move dialogs (preferred over 'copy-confirmation').

tools.name: dialog

tools.description: Open the search dialog with optional pre-filled query and filters. If autoRun (default true), runs the search immediately. Acks once the dialog has mounted; does not wait for results to render.

autoRun.description: Default true: open and run the search. False: open and prefill without running.

isDirectory.description: Type filter: true = folders only, false = files only, omit for both

mode.description: Search mode. Defaults to 'ai' if AI is enabled, otherwise 'filename'.

query.description: Search query to pre-fill in the search bar

scope.description: Scope string, same syntax as the scope chip: comma-separated paths, ! prefix for excludes

tools.name: open_search_dialog

tools.description: Quit the application
tools.name: quit

tools.description: Switch focus to the other pane
tools.name: switch_pane

tools.description: Swap left and right pane directories, view modes, sort orders, and selections
tools.name: swap_panes

tools.description: Structured file search across the entire drive index

caseSensitive.description: Case-sensitive matching. Default: false on macOS, true on Linux

excludeSystemDirs.description: Exclude system/build/cache folders (node_modules, .git, Caches, etc). Default: true

pattern.description: Glob or regex filename pattern (for example, "*.pdf", "report*")

scope.description: Scope string: comma-separated paths, ! for excludes (for example, "~/projects, !node_modules")

sizeMin.description: Minimum file size, human-readable (for example, "1 MB", "500 KB")

type.description: Filter by type. Omit for both.

tools.name: search

tools.description: Natural language file search using the configured LLM to translate the query

query.description: Natural language search query (for example, "recent invoices marked rymd")

scope.description: Scope string: comma-separated paths, ! for excludes (for example, "~/projects, !node_modules"). Merged with AI-inferred scope.

tools.name: ai_search

tools.description: Set a setting value. Use the cmdr://settings resource to discover available settings and their constraints.
tools.name: set_setting

tools.description: Add a manual SMB server by address. Checks TCP reachability then adds to the host list.

address.description: Server address: hostname, IP, IP:port, or smb:// URL

tools.name: connect_to_server

tools.description: Remove a manually-added server from the host list.

hostId.description: Host ID to remove (for example, manual-192-168-1-100-9445)

tools.name: remove_manual_server

tools.description: Upgrade an OS-mounted SMB volume to a direct smb2 session for faster I/O. Uses Keychain creds. Returns OK, NeedsCredentials, or NetworkError. See cmdr://state volumes for each SMB share's smbConnectionState.

volumeId.description: Volume ID of the SMB share (e.g. smb-192-168-1-111-445-naspi). See cmdr://state volumes.

tools.name: upgrade_smb_to_direct

tools.description: Wait until a condition is met on a pane. Use after fire-and-forget actions or to wait for async events like network discovery.

afterGeneration.description: Only consider state updates after this generation number. Prevents matching stale state from before an action. Get the current generation from cmdr://state or a previous await result.

condition.description: Condition to wait for: has_item / not_has_item (file list contains / no longer contains item named value — use not_has_item after a delete), item_count_gte / item_count_lte (file list has >= / <= value items), path (pane path equals value), path_contains (pane path contains value)

value.description: Value for the condition (item name, count, path, or substring)

tools.name: await

tools.description: Navigate the focused pane to the most recently observed eligible file in ~/Downloads and select it. Errors if no eligible file exists or Cmdr lacks Full Disk Access.
tools.name: go_to_latest_download
